scripts.local: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {spawn}=require('node:child_process'); const pkg=process.env.npm_package_json; if(!pkg){throw new Error('npm_package_json no esta definido');} const script=path.join(path.dirname(pkg),'scripts','dev-local.mjs'); const child=spawn(process.execPath,[script],{stdio:'inherit'}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code??0));"
scripts.local:clean: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {spawn}=require('node:child_process'); const pkg=process.env.npm_package_json; if(!pkg){throw new Error('npm_package_json no esta definido');} const script=path.join(path.dirname(pkg),'scripts','local-clean.mjs'); const child=spawn(process.execPath,[script],{stdio:'inherit'}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code??0));"
scripts.db:studio: corepack pnpm --filter @crafter/database exec prisma studio --schema prisma/schema.prisma
